meta.description: Claude Code tool 调用错误返回值大全

schema_validation_errors.description: InputValidationError - JSON Schema 校验失败，工具根本不会执行

missing_single_required_param.raw_error:
InputValidationError: Read failed due to the following issue:
The required parameter `file_path` is missing

missing_multiple_required_params.description: 缺少多个必需参数，全部列出

examples.raw_error:
InputValidationError: Write failed due to the following issues:
The required parameter `file_path` is missing
The required parameter `content` is missing

InputValidationError: Edit failed due to the following issues:
The required parameter `file_path` is missing
The required parameter `old_string` is missing
The required parameter `new_string` is missing

InputValidationError: Agent failed due to the following issues:
The required parameter `description` is missing
The required parameter `prompt` is missing

InputValidationError: WebFetch failed due to the following issues:
The required parameter `url` is missing
The required parameter `prompt` is missing

InputValidationError: NotebookEdit failed due to the following issues:
The required parameter `notebook_path` is missing
The required parameter `new_source` is missing

InputValidationError: TaskCreate failed due to the following issues:
The required parameter `subject` is missing
The required parameter `description` is missing

missing_multiple_required_params.pattern:
{ToolName} failed due to the following issues:
The required parameter `{param1}` is missing
The required parameter `{param2}` is missing
...

examples.raw_error:
InputValidationError: Read failed due to the following issue:
The parameter `limit` type is expected as `number` but provided as `string`

InputValidationError: Bash failed due to the following issue:
The parameter `timeout` type is expected as `number` but provided as `string`

InputValidationError: Grep failed due to the following issue:
The parameter `head_limit` type is expected as `number` but provided as `string`

wrong_type_string_for_number.pattern: The parameter `{param_name}` type is expected as `number` but provided as `string`

examples.raw_error:
InputValidationError: Bash failed due to the following issue:
The parameter `run_in_background` type is expected as `boolean` but provided as `string`

wrong_type_string_for_boolean.pattern: The parameter `{param_name}` type is expected as `boolean` but provided as `string`

invalid_enum_value_simple.description: 枚举值无效（简单枚举）- 返回 JSON 结构

invalid_enum_value_union.description: 枚举值无效（union 类型）- 展示所有 union 分支的校验错误

execution_errors.description: 工具通过了 schema 校验但执行失败 - 包装在 <tool_use_error> 或直接返回文本

file_not_found_read.description: Read - 文件不存在（绝对路径 / 相对路径均触发）
file_not_found_read.raw_error: File does not exist. Note: your current working directory is /Users/apple/worktrees/leon--feat-agent-tool-refactor.
file_not_found_read.note: 相对路径会被解析为 cwd 相对路径，依然可能触发此错误

file_not_found_edit.raw_error: File does not exist. Note: your current working directory is /Users/apple/worktrees/leon--feat-agent-tool-refactor.

directory_not_found_glob.raw_error: Directory does not exist: nonexistent/path. Note: your current working directory is /Users/apple/worktrees/leon--feat-agent-tool-refactor.

edit_string_not_found.description: Edit - old_string 在文件中不存在
edit_string_not_found.raw_error:
String to replace not found in file.
String: some_string_not_present_xyz_987
edit_string_not_found.format:
<tool_use_error>String to replace not found in file.
String: ...</tool_use_error>

edit_multiple_matches.description: Edit - old_string 匹配多处，但 replace_all=false
edit_multiple_matches.raw_error:
Found 4 matches of the string to replace, but replace_all is false. To replace all occurrences, set replace_all to true. To replace only one occurrence, please provide more context to uniquely identify the instance.
String: localhost
edit_multiple_matches.format: <tool_use_error>Found {N} matches of the string to replace, but replace_all is false. ...</tool_use_error>

notebook_edit_missing_cell_type.description: NotebookEdit - edit_mode=insert 时缺少 cell_type（逻辑校验，非 schema 校验）
notebook_edit_missing_cell_type.raw_error: Cell type is required when using edit_mode=insert.
notebook_edit_missing_cell_type.format: <tool_use_error>Cell type is required when using edit_mode=insert.</tool_use_error>
notebook_edit_missing_cell_type.note: 这是工具内部的业务逻辑校验，不是 JSON Schema 校验，所以不以 InputValidationError 开头

task_not_found.description: TaskUpdate / TaskGet - 任务 ID 不存在

examples.note: 返回普通文本，不是 error 标签
返回普通文本，不是 error 标签

timeout_out_of_range_ignored.description: Bash timeout 超过最大值 600000 - 不报错，直接执行（schema 未校验范围上限）
timeout_out_of_range_ignored.note: JSON Schema 中标注 maximum:600000，但实际未校验，工具照常执行

grep_invalid_type_silently_ignored.description: Grep type 参数传入无效文件类型 - 不报错，返回空结果
grep_invalid_type_silently_ignored.note: 非枚举约束的字符串参数，非法值被静默忽略

read_negative_offset.description: Read offset=-1 - 不报错，从第 -1 行开始（等效于从头）
read_negative_offset.raw_output: 正常返回文件内容，行号从 -1 开始
read_negative_offset.note: 负数 offset 被接受，行号从负数开始显示

error_wrapper_tags.<tool_use_error>: schema 校验失败 OR 工具执行失败（抛出异常）
error_wrapper_tags.plain_text: 工具执行完成但结果表示失败（如 'Task not found'、'No files found'）

validation_error_formats.simple_text: 缺少参数、类型错误 → 人类可读的文本描述
validation_error_formats.json_array: 枚举错误、union 错误 → JSON 数组，每项含 code/values/path/message

error_codes_observed.invalid_value: 枚举值不在允许列表中
error_codes_observed.invalid_union: union 类型所有分支均校验失败

key_observations: 所有 schema 校验错误都以 InputValidationError 开头
缺少参数 / 类型错误 → 简单文本格式
枚举/union 错误 → JSON 数组格式（可能是不同的校验库）
工具内部逻辑错误（Edit 找不到字符串等）→ <tool_use_error> 但不以 InputValidationError 开头
某些软性失败（Task not found）→ 普通文本，没有 error 标签
JSON Schema 的 minimum/maximum 数值约束未被强制校验（timeout=999999999 照常执行）
非枚举字符串参数的非法值会被静默忽略（Grep type=invalid_type）
